name: CreditCardValidator

unions.name: CardType
unions.comment: Card types supported by this library are: American Express (AM), Discover (DS), Diners Club (DC), Mastercard (MC) and VISA (VI).

unions.name: Range
unions.comment: Represents possible ranges for a creditcard number. It can be a string or a range with starting and ending digits

aliases.name: CardTypeInfo
aliases.type: { name : String, cardType : CardType, bins : List Range, valid_lengths : List Int }

aliases.name: ValidationResult
aliases.comment:
A card number can match multiple card types. 
Overall, a number is valid when it's valid according to [luhn algorithm](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Luhn_algorithm) with valid length and type.
aliases.type: { card_types : List (Maybe CardTypeInfo), valid : Bool, luhn_valid : Bool, length_valid : Bool, cardTypeValid : Bool }

values.name: allCardTypes
values.comment: List of CardTypeInfo for all supported types

values.name: cardTypeByBinRange
values.comment: Find card info whose ranges contain a pattern that the card number matches

values.name: filterByCardTypes
values.type: List CardTypeInfo -> List CardType -> List CardTypeInfo

values.name: mopToCardType
values.comment: Converts from string MOP (Method of Payment) to CardType

values.name: validCardLength
values.comment: Finds whether card length is one of the valid lengths for the type

values.name: validate
values.comment: Find whether a creditcard number is valid. You can limit what card types are eligible for the validation attempt.
